----- Forwarded by Jeff Dasovich/NA/Enron on 11/01/2000 11:14 AM -----

	"Dasovich, Jeff" <jdasovic@enron.com>
	11/01/2000 10:58 AM
		 
		 To: "'klay@enron.com'" <klay@enron.com>

		 Subject: RE: California

I'm not sure what you mean by "California" in the context of the California PUC's decision.  
I think the PUC's decision was that the ISO should be allowed to set the price of 
electricity in the ISO's market.  I think the ISO should be allowed to set the price of 
electricity in the ISO's market.  

Jeff

Carr Futures

Sub-Programs
The Energy and Utilities Sub-Programs are designed to provide
information to the energy and utilities markets.

The Energy Sub-Programs provide market participants with
information on the fundamentals of energy markets,
including energy prices, supply and demand, and
market fundamentals.

The Utilities Sub-Programs provide market participants
with information on the fundamentals of the electric
power industry, including generation, transmission,
distribution, and retail markets.

The Energy and Utilities Sub-Programs are managed by the
Energy and Utilities Group.

The Energy and Utilities Sub-Programs are available to all members of the
Carr Futures Energy Service.
